samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>A simplified radix-2 divider for 8-bit signed or unsigned integers.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">The clock signal for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">Indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">The input dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">The input divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">A 1-bit input indicating a valid operation request.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">A 1-bit output indicating the result is valid and ready.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">The output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
        <input id="res_ready">A 1-bit input indicating that the 16-bit output result has already been acknowledged.</input>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <state id="IDLE">Idle state.</state>
        <state id="DIVIDE">Divide state.</state>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter for tracking iterations.</reg>
        <reg id="start_cnt">Start flag for initiating division.</reg>
        <reg id="res_valid_reg">Register to hold the result validity status.</reg>
        <wire id="neg_divisor" width_description="[8:0]">Negated divisor for subtraction.</wire>
        <wire id="sub_result" width_description="[9:0]">Subtraction result.</wire>
        <wire id="mux_out" width_description="[8:0]">Multiplexer output.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_in" width_description="[8:0]">Shift register input.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_out" width_description="[8:0]">Shift register output.</wire>
        <wire id="shift_left" width_description="[8:0]">Left-shifted shift register output.</wire>
        <wire id="carry_out">Carry-out from the subtraction.</wire>
        <wire id="abs_dividend" width_description="[7:0]">Absolute value of the dividend.</wire>
        <wire id="abs_divisor" width_description="[7:0]">Absolute value of the divisor.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_shift_left" width_description="[8:0]">Shift-lefted shift register output.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_shift_right" width_description="[8:0]">Right-shifted shift register output.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_out" width_description="[8:0]">Mux output for shift register.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_sel" width_description="[8:0]">Select line for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry" width_description="[8:0]">Carry output for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_out" width_description="[8:0]">Carry output for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in_out" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in_out_in" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in_out_in_in" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in_out_in_in_in" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
        <wire id="sr_mux_carry_in_out_in_in_in_in" width_description="[8:0]">Carry input for mux.</wire>
